allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait\('F5'\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $screenshotPath = "$env:TEMP\\hero_redesign_1.png"; $bitmap.Save\($screenshotPath\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Screenshot saved: $screenshotPath")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait\('{Home}'\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $screenshotPath = "$env:TEMP\\hero_redesign_2.png"; $bitmap.Save\($screenshotPath\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell(for \($i=0; $i -lt 2; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3.5; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen; $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Bounds.Width, $screen.Bounds.Height\); $graphics = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bitmap\); $graphics.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Bounds.Size\); $screenshotPath = "$env:TEMP\\hero_redesign_$\($i+3\).png"; $bitmap.Save\($screenshotPath\); $graphics.Dispose\(\); $bitmap.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "Screenshot $\($i+3\) saved" })
